patient's medical supplies are clinically appropriate, then the patient's choice is 
controlling. The HHA is not required to duplicate the medical supplies if the patient 
elects to use his or her own medical supplies. However, if the patient prefers to have the 
HHA provide medical supplies while the patient is under a Medicare home health plan of 
care, then the HHA must provide the medical supplies. The HHA may not require that 
the patient obtain or use medical supplies
